stats.fact: Cursor has more than 1 million daily users and 50,000 businesses using the product (Bloomberg, March 2026)
Roughly 2 in 3 Fortune 500 companies now use Cursor
Enterprise revenue share grew from primarily individual developers in 2024 to 60% enterprise revenue in 2026
Cursor had 82.2% awareness among developers in State of AI 2025 survey, with 33.1% having used it
In March 2026 standardised test, Cursor built a responsive data table component in 2 rounds of prompting vs Windsurf 3 and GitHub Copilot 5
Cursor 3 was released on April 2, 2026, developed under internal codename Glass
April 24, 2026 update introduced improved worktrees experience and multi-root workspaces for cross-repo changes
